mapper.sql:
tpi.plan_id, tpi.begin_date, tpi.end_date, tpi.training_time_quantity, tpi.training_address,
STUFF(( SELECT '，' + tpcm.check_method FROM td_plan_check_method tpcm where tpcm.plan_implement_id = tpi.id and tpcm.enabled_flag = 1 FOR XML PATH ( '' )), 1, 1, '' ) as check_method, tpi.training_money, tpi.request_by, tpi.request_date, tpi.current_node, tpi.current_person, tpi.oa_order, tpi.enabled_flag, tpi.approval_status, tpi.out_teacher, tpi.out_emp, tpi.id, tpi.create_time, tpi.create_by, tpi.update_time, tpi.update_by, tpi.payment_des, tpi.overall_attendance_description,tpi.practicalParticipationTotal as practical_participation_total

${tAlias}.plan_id as ${tAlias}_plan_id, ${tAlias}.begin_date as ${tAlias}_begin_date, ${tAlias}.end_date as ${tAlias}_end_date, ${tAlias}.training_time_quantity as ${tAlias}_training_time_quantity, ${tAlias}.training_address as ${tAlias}_training_address, ${tAlias}.check_method as ${tAlias}_check_method, ${tAlias}.training_money as ${tAlias}_training_money, ${tAlias}.request_by as ${tAlias}_request_by, ${tAlias}.request_date as ${tAlias}_request_date, ${tAlias}.current_node as ${tAlias}_current_node, ${tAlias}.current_person as ${tAlias}_current_person, ${tAlias}.oa_order as ${tAlias}_oa_order, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.approval_status as ${tAlias}_approval_status, ${tAlias}.out_teacher as ${tAlias}_out_teacher, ${tAlias}.out_emp as ${tAlias}_out_emp, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.payment_des as ${tAlias}_payment_des, ${tAlias}.overall_attendance_description as ${tAlias}_overall_attendance_description, ${tAlias}.absenceTotal as ${tAlias}_absenceTotal,${tAlias}.practicalParticipationTotal as ${tAlias}_practicalParticipationTotal

select
, tp.training_no as tp_training_no, tp.training_name AS tp_training_name, tp.training_method AS tp_training_method, tp.training_content AS tp_training_content, tp.training_purpose AS tp_training_purpose, tp.training_level AS tp_training_level, tp.profession_classify AS tp_profession_classify, tp.dependence_dept AS tp_dependence_dept, isnull( (select fdt.dept_name from fnd_dept fdt where fdt.id = tp.host_dept_id and fdt.enabled_flag = 1 and fdt.deleted_flag = 0 and tp.enabled_flag = 1 ) , tp.host_dept ) as tp_host_dept, tp.teacher AS tp_teacher, tp.employee_describes AS tp_employee_describes, tp.plan_date AS tp_plan_date, case when (select count(1) from td_plan_result tpr_t where tpr_t.plan_id = tp.id and tpr_t.enabled_flag = 1 ) > 0 then (select count(1) from td_plan_result tpr_t where tpr_t.plan_id = tp.id and tpr_t.enabled_flag = 1 ) else null end as tp_employee_quantity, tp.plan_money AS tp_plan_money, tp.online_flag AS tp_online_flag, tp.remark AS tp_remark, tp.enabled_flag AS tp_enabled_flag, tp.plan_status AS tp_plan_status, tp.id AS tp_id, tp.create_time AS tp_create_time, tp.create_by AS tp_create_by, tp.update_time AS tp_update_time, tp.update_by AS tp_update_by, tp.plan_type AS tp_plan_type, tp.plan_charge_id AS tp_plan_charge_id, tp.dept_charge_id AS tp_dept_charge_id, tp.show_flag AS tp_show_flag
, isnull(pe.name, '') as tp_dept_charge_name , isnull(pet.name, '') as tp_plan_charge_name , isnull(pe.work_card, '') as tp_dept_charge_work_card , isnull(pet.work_card, '') as tp_plan_charge_work_card , (select top 1 isnull(pe.email_inside, fu.email) from fnd_user fu where fu.employee_id = pe.id and fu.enabled_flag = 1 ) as tp_dept_charge_email , (select top 1 isnull(pe.email_inside, fu.email) from fnd_user fu where fu.employee_id = pet.id and fu.enabled_flag = 1 ) as tP_plan_charge_email
from td_plan_implement tpi left join td_plan tp on tpi.plan_id = tp.id and tpi.enabled_flag = 1 left join pm_employee pe on pe.id = tp.dept_charge_id left join pm_employee pet on pet.id = tp.plan_charge_id and pet.enabled_flag = 1
mapper.insert: insert into td_plan_implement (plan_id, begin_date, end_date, training_time_quantity, training_address, check_method, training_money, request_by, request_date, current_node, current_person, oa_order, enabled_flag, approval_status, out_teacher, out_emp, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, payment_des, overall_attendance_description) values (#{planId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{beginDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{endDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{trainingTimeQuantity,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{trainingAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{checkMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trainingMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{requestBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{requestDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{currentNode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{currentPerson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{oaOrder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{approvalStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{outTeacher,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{outEmp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{paymentDes, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{overallAttendanceDescription, jdbcType = VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select id, (select plan_charge_id from td_plan where enabled_flag = 1 and id = #{id, jdbcType = BIGINT}) as tp_plan_charge_id from td_plan_implement where plan_id = #{id, jdbcType = BIGINT} and enabled_flag = 1

select
from td_plan_implement tpi where tpi.enabled_flag = 1 and tpi.plan_id = #{planId, jdbcType = BIGINT}
